Part.Source: Event Start txtPeriodoMaximo.ForeColor = rgb(169, 152, 0) &PedidosSelecionados = 'SEL_WWPEDIDOCOMPRA' RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WWPEDIDOCOMPRA', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) RetornaAutorizacao.Call('COMPRAAUTORIZAFECHAMENTO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1, &AutorizaFechamentoAutNiv) LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod //&FilCod = &Context.FilCod &PesCod = &Context.PesCod &FiltroKey = 'FLT#WWPedidoCompraColumnsSelector' &UmZero = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(&FiltroKey) Do CAse Case &UmZero = '2' &SalvarFiltro = false Case &UmZero = '1' &SalvarFiltro = true Otherwise RetornaConfUsuario.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.PesCod, domConfUsuario.Uconf001_PadraoFiltro, &UmZero) if &UmZero = '2' &SalvarFiltro = false Else &SalvarFiltro = true EndiF EndCase RetornaConfSistema.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon194_ExigirAutorizacaoFechaCompra, &ExigirAutorizacaoFechar) RetornaConfSistema.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon201_QtdDiaMaximoConsultasTela, &TCon201_QtdDiaMaximoConsultasTela) &QtdDiasMaximo.FromString(&TCon201_QtdDiaMaximoConsultasTela) txtPeriodoMaximo.Caption = 'Intervalo máximo de consulta, '+trim(toformattedString(&QtdDiasMaximo)) + ' dias.' &TCon194.FromString(&ExigirAutorizacaoFechar) btnAutorizarPedido.Visible = &TCon194 = Status_SimNao.Sim And &AutorizaFechamentoAutNiv >= 1 &FilCod.Clear() &Count = 0 tbFilialFaturamento.Visible = 0 tbFilialLancamento.Visible = 0 if &Context.FilialLancamento.Count > 1 tbFilialLancamento.Visible = 1 &PedFatFilCod = 0 for &FilialLancamento in &Context.FilialLancamento &FilCod.AddItem(&FilialLancamento.PesFilAce, substr(&FilialLancamento.PesFilRaz,1,20) ) &Count += 1 EndFor Else &FilCod.AddItem(&Context.FilCod, substr(&Context.FilRaz,1,20) ) &FilCod = &Context.FilCod Endif do 'montaFilialFaturamento' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ tbFilialFaturamento.Width = 90 tbFilialLancamento.Width = 90 &TCon083_Markup.Visible = False &EmpCod.Visible = False Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName DDO_GridColumnsSelector.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &ExppData = new() &ExppDataItem = new() &ExppDataItem.Title = 'Totalizar Compras' &ExppDataItem.EventKey = !'Totalizar' &ExppDataItem.IsDivider = False &ExppData.Add(&ExppDataItem) &ExppDataItem = new() &ExppDataItem.Title = '------------' &ExppDataItem.EventKey = !'espaco2' &ExppDataItem.IsDivider = False &ExppData.Add(&ExppDataItem) &ExppDataItem = new() &ExppDataItem.Title = 'Exportar Excel' &ExppDataItem.Icon = ActionExport.Link() &ExppDataItem.EventKey = !'Export' &ExppDataItem.IsDivider = False &ExppData.Add(&ExppDataItem) &ExppDataItem = new() &ExppDataItem.Title = 'Exportar PDF' &ExppDataItem.Icon = ActionExportReport.Link() &ExppDataItem.EventKey = !'ExportReport' &ExppDataItem.IsDivider = False &ExppData.Add(&ExppDataItem) If (&SalvarFiltro = false) &ExppDataItem = new() &ExppDataItem.Title = 'Salvar Filtros' &ExppDataItem.Icon = ActionManageFilters.Link() &ExppDataItem.EventKey = !'SalvaFiltros' &ExppDataItem.IsDivider = False &ExppData.Add(&ExppDataItem) Endif If (&SalvarFiltro = true) &ExppDataItem = new() &ExppDataItem.Title = 'Não Salvar Filtros' &ExppDataItem.Icon = ActionCleanFilters.Link() &ExppDataItem.EventKey = !'NaoSalvar' &ExppDataItem.IsDivider = False &ExppData.Add(&ExppDataItem) Endif &PedBlq = nullvalue(&PedBlq) &LctAtuSal = nullvalue(&LctAtuSal) &PedSts = nullvalue(&PedSts) &PedStsFin = nullvalue(&PedStsFin) Form.Caption = ' Lançamento Pedidos' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' &OrderedBy.Clear() &OrderedBy.AddItem(1, 'Ped. Decresc.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(2, 'Ped. Cresc.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(3, 'Prev. Decresc.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(4, 'Prev. Cresc.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(5, 'Nome Cliente') &OrderedBy.AddItem(6, 'Data Emissão Cresc.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(7, 'Data Emissão Decresc.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(8, 'Data Faturado Cresc.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(9, 'Data Faturado Decresc.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(10, 'Data Previsão Cresc.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(11, 'Data Previsão Decresc.') If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() DDO_GridColumnsSelector.TitleControlIdToReplace = BtnEditColumns.InternalName GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ If &PedDtaEms_To.IsEmpty() and &PedDtaEms.IsEmpty() &PedDtaEms_To = Serverdate() &PedDtaEms = &PedDtaEms_To - 30 do 'diasMaximo' Do 'SaveGridState' Else do 'diasMaximo' Do 'SaveGridState' EndIF tbStsCrd.Visible = (&ExigirAutorizacaoFechar = 'S' or &ExigirAutorizacaoFechar = 'X') &NovoStatusFinanceiro.Visible = (&ExigirAutorizacaoFechar = 'S' or &ExigirAutorizacaoFechar = 'X') Do 'GetComboSts' EndEvent Event Refresh &PedidosSelecionados = 'SEL_WWPEDIDOCOMPRA' &OldPedCliCod = &PedCliCod do 'diasMaximo' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' If &Session.Get(!'wwPedidoCompraColumnsSelector') <> '' &ColumnsSelectorXML = &Session.Get(!'wwPedidoCompraColumnsSelector') &ColumnsSelector.FromXml(&ColumnsSelectorXML) Else Do 'InitializeColumnsSelector' EndIf &IsMarcado.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(1).IsVisible PedCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(2).IsVisible &gridPedCliCodRaz.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(3).IsVisible PedDtaEms.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(4).IsVisible PedSts.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(5).IsVisible &NovoStatusFinanceiro.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(6).IsVisible PedDtaPrv.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(7).IsVisible PedDtaFat.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(8).IsVisible &AuxFin.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(9).IsVisible PedVlrBrt.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(10).IsVisible PedVlrLiq.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(11).IsVisible PedVenCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(12).IsVisible LctCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(13).IsVisible PedFatFilCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(14).IsVisible PedNum.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(15).IsVisible PedNroNfeAut.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(16).IsVisible PedNroNfsAut.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(17).IsVisible &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ //&FilCod = &Context.FilCod retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWTABELAPRECO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 2, &TabelaPrecoNiv) do 'loadSelecionados' EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load &gridPedCliCodRaz.Link = VerPedido.Link(&Pgmname, EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) If PedNroNfeAut > 0 PedNroNfeAut.Link = VerNota.link(EmpCod,FilCod,PedCod) else PedNroNfeAut.Link = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &SupUpdate = !'' &ActioCompra.Clear() &ActioCompra.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') If (PedStsPrc = AtualizandoEstoquePedido.Abrindo or PedStsPrc = AtualizandoEstoquePedido.Fechando) &ActioCompra.AddItem(1, 'Ajustar Estoque') Endif If (PedSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO or PedSts = Status_Pedido.SEPARANDO) &ActioCompra.AddItem(2, 'Fechar Estoque') Endif If (PedStsFin = Status_Financeiro.ABERTO) &ActioCompra.AddItem(3, 'Fechar Financeiro') Endif If (PedStsFin = Status_Financeiro.FECHADO) &ActioCompra.AddItem(4, 'Alterar Financeiro') Endif If (PedSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO or PedSts = Status_Pedido.CANCELADO) &ActioCompra.AddItem(5, 'Abrir Estoque') Endif If ((PedSts in (Status_Pedido.ABERTO, Status_Pedido.SEPARANDO)) and (LctAtuSal <> Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum) and (LctEmsCot = Status_SimNao.Sim OR LctDesFun = Status_SimNao.Sim)) &ActioCompra.AddItem(6, 'Emitir Nota') Endif &ActioCompra.AddItem(7, 'Copiar Pedido') &ActioCompra.AddItem(8, 'Ref./Ane./Cot.') If (&TabelaPrecoNiv > 1) &ActioCompra.AddItem(9, 'Tabela Venda') Endif &ActioCompra.AddItem(10, 'Críticas Pedido') If (PedSts = Status_pedido.ABERTO) &ActioCompra.AddItem(11, 'Cancelar Pedido') Endif &ActioCompra.AddItem(12, 'Etiqueta Produto') &EnviarEmail = !'' &ImprimirPedido = !'' &gridPedCliCodRaz = iif(PedCliCodRaz.Length() > 30, Substr(PedCliCodRaz,1,30)+'...', PedCliCodRaz) &AuxFin = UPPER(Substr(PedStsFin.EnumerationDescription(), 1,3)) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ If LctTip = TipoLancamento.OrcamentoCompra PedCod.ForeColor = RGB(255,0,0) Else PedCod.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) EndIF Do Case Case PedStsFin = Status_Financeiro.CANCELADO &AuxFin.ForeColor = RGB(255, 132, 0) Case PedStsFin = Status_Financeiro.ABERTO &AuxFin.ForeColor = RGB(0, 100, 200) Otherwise &AuxFin.ForeColor = RGB(0, 0, 0) EndCase If PedSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO &SupUpdate.Link = PedidoCompras.Link(TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, 'WWPEDIDOCOMPRA') &SupUpdate.TooltipText = "GXM_update" Else &SupUpdate.Link = VerPedido.Link(&Pgmname, EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) &SupUpdate = !'' &SupUpdate.TooltipText = "Visualizar Pedido" Endif // prcStatusPedidoRGB.Call(EmpCod, PedNovStsFinNom, &R, &G, &B ) // PedStsFin.ForeColor = RGB(&R, &G, &B) prcStatusPedidoRGB_Nome.Call(EmpCod, PedNovStsFinCod, &NovoStatusFinanceiro, &R, &G, &B ) &NovoStatusFinanceiro.ForeColor = RGB(&R, &G, &B) prcStatusPedidoRGB.Call(EmpCod, PedNovStsNom, &R, &G, &B ) PedSts.ForeColor = RGB(&R, &G, &B) PedVenCod.TooltipText = trim(PedVenRaz) LctCod.TooltipText = Trim(LctNom) &AuxPedCod = PedCod &IsMarcado = false do 'IsSelecionado' EndEvent Event DDO_GridColumnsSelector.OnColumnsChanged /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelectorXML = DDO_GridColumnsSelector.ColumnsSelectorValues &ColumnsSelector.FromJson(&ColumnsSelectorXML) SaveColumnsSelectorState(!'wwPedidoCompraColumnsSelector', &ColumnsSelector.ToXml()) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &ActioCompra.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &ActioCompra = 1 Do 'Do AjustarStatusPedido' Case &ActioCompra = 2 Do 'Do FechaEstoqueFinanceiro' Case &ActioCompra = 3 Do 'Do FechaFinanceiro' Case &ActioCompra = 4 Do 'Do AlterarFinanceiro' Case &ActioCompra = 5 Do 'Do AbrirEstoquePedido' Case &ActioCompra = 6 Do 'Do EmitirNota' Case &ActioCompra = 7 Do 'Do CopiarPedido' Case &ActioCompra = 8 Do 'Do AdicionaObs' Case &ActioCompra = 9 Do 'Do PrecoVenda' Case &ActioCompra = 10 Do 'Do Criticaspedido' Case &ActioCompra = 11 Do 'Do CancelarPedido' Case &ActioCompra = 12 Do 'Do geraEtiquetaProduto' EndCase &ActioCompra = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ wpLocalizaNotaPedido.PopUp(&EmpCod, &Pedcod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoNewInsert' PedidoCompras.Call(TrnMode.Insert, &Context.EmpCod, &FilCod, 0, 'WWPEDIDOCOMPRA') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ddo_Expp.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case ddo_Expp.ActiveEventKey = !'Totalizar' Do 'Do Totalizar' Case ddo_Expp.ActiveEventKey = !'espaco2' Do 'Do espaco2' Case ddo_Expp.ActiveEventKey = !'Export' Do 'DoExport' Case ddo_Expp.ActiveEventKey = !'ExportReport' Do 'DoExportReport' Case ddo_Expp.ActiveEventKey = !'SalvaFiltros' Do 'Do SalvaFiltros' Case ddo_Expp.ActiveEventKey = !'NaoSalvar' Do 'Do NaoSalvar' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Totalizar_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wpTotalizaPedidos.Create(&FinMedioMoeda, &medioMoeda, &PedidoMoeda, &QtdPedidos, &FinQtdPedido, &FinPedidoMoeda) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoImpXMLCompra' &WebSession.Remove('ImportarXmlCompra_Data') &ImportarXmlCompraData.SelecionarXML.DeOndeVem = 'WWPEDIDOCOMPRA' &ImportarXmlCompraData.SelecionarXML.PedFilCod = &FilCod //Filial de lançamento pega da tela no filtro &WebSession.Set('ImportarXmlCompra_Data', &ImportarXmlCompraData.ToJson()) ImportarXmlCompra.Link('SelecionarXML','SelecionarXML', false) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoAutorizarPedido' if &SdtPedidos.Count > 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AutorizarPedido_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else msg('É necessário selecionar ao menos um pedido para se autorizar.') EndIF EndEvent Event AutorizarPedido_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = WcAutorizaPedidosFechamento.Create(&sdtPedidos) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event AutorizarPedido_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'InitializeColumnsSelector' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelector = new WWPColumnsSelector() WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&IsMarcado", '', !'#', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedCod", '', !'Pedido', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&gridPedCliCodRaz", '', !'Fornecedor', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedDtaEms", '', !'Emissão', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedSts", '', !'Estoque', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&NovoStatusFinanceiro", '', !'Crédito', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedDtaPrv", '', !'Previsão', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedDtaFat", '', !'Faturado', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&AuxFin", '', !'Fin.', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedVlrBrt", '', !'R$.Bruto', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedVlrLiq", '', !'R$.Líq.', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedVenCod", '', !'Comprador', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"LctCod", '', !'Lct.', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedFatFilCod", '', !'Fil. Fat', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedNum", '', !'Ped For.', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedNroNfeAut", '', !'NFe', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedNroNfsAut", '', !'NFSe', False, '') &UserCustomValue = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(!'wwPedidoCompraColumnsSelector') If not(&UserCustomValue.IsEmpty()) &ColumnsSelectorAux.FromXml(&UserCustomValue) WWP_ColumnSelector_UpdateColumns(&ColumnsSelectorAux, &ColumnsSelector) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &LctCod1.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat1.Visible = False &PedNum1.Visible = False &PedVenCod1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDDTAFAT' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDNUM' &PedNum1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDVENCOD' &PedVenCod1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &LctCod2.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat2.Visible = False &PedNum2.Visible = False &PedVenCod2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDDTAFAT' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDNUM' &PedNum2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDVENCOD' &PedVenCod2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &LctCod3.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat3.Visible = False &PedNum3.Visible = False &PedVenCod3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDDTAFAT' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDNUM' &PedNum3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDVENCOD' &PedVenCod3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AjustarStatusPedido' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AjustarStatusPedido_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do FechaEstoqueFinanceiro' If PedSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO or PedSts = Status_Pedido.SEPARANDO If (&TCon194 <> Status_SimNao.Sim) Or (&TCon194 = Status_SimNao.Sim And PedStsCrd = Status_Autorizado.AUTORIZADO) if PedStsPrc = AtualizandoEstoquePedido.Abrindo or PedStsPrc = AtualizandoEstoquePedido.Fechando AjustarStatusPedido_Modal.Confirm() Else If LctTip = TipoLancamento.EntradaMercadoria &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('COMPRAFECHAESTOQUE', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 VerificaLoteInformadoPedidoCompra.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, &IsTodosInformados, &mensagem) if &IsTodosInformados = false wpInformaLotesFaltantesPedido.Link('WWPEDIDOCOMPRA', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Else wpFechaEstoquePedidoCompra.Link('WWPEDIDOCOMPRA', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndiF Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Fechar Estoque Pedido Compra. [COMPRAFECHAESTOQUE]') EndIF Else msg('Pedido consta como ORÇAMENTO, ajuste!') EndiF EndIf Else msg('Pedido exige uma autorização para realizar fechamento!') EndIf Else msg('Pedido já Fechado!') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do FechaFinanceiro' &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('COMPRAFECHAFINANCEIRO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 If (&TCon194 <> Status_SimNao.Sim) Or (&TCon194 = Status_SimNao.Sim And PedStsCrd = Status_Autorizado.AUTORIZADO) padraoUsuario.Call('G', 'HAVERSERLECIONADO_FCHDV', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, '', &PadDtaMod) wpFechaFinanceiroCompras.Call('WWPEDIDOCOMPRA', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Else msg('Pedido exige uma autorização para realizar fechamento!') EndIf Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Fechar Financeiro Pedido Compra. [COMPRAFECHAFINANCEIRO]') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AlterarFinanceiro' &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('COMPRAFECHAFINANCEIRO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 padraoUsuario.Call('G', 'HAVERSERLECIONADO_FCHDV', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, '', &PadDtaMod) wpFechaFinanceiroCompras.Call('WWPEDIDOCOMPRA', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Fechar Financeiro Pedido Compra. [COMPRAFECHAFINANCEIRO]') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AbrirEstoquePedido' If PedSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO or PedSts = Status_Pedido.CANCELADO if PedStsPrc = AtualizandoEstoquePedido.Abrindo or PedStsPrc = AtualizandoEstoquePedido.Fechando AjustarStatusPedido_Modal.Confirm() Else &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('COMPRAABREESTOQUE', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AbrirEstoquePedido_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Abrir Estoque Pedido Compra. [COMPRAABREESTOQUE]') EndIF Endif Else msg('Opção Disponível somente pedido Fechados!') EndiF EndSub Sub 'Do EmitirNota' &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('COMPRAFECHAESTOQUE', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 if PedStsPrc = AtualizandoEstoquePedido.Abrindo or PedStsPrc = AtualizandoEstoquePedido.Fechando AjustarStatusPedido_Modal.Confirm() Else Do Case Case LctAtuSal = Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum msg('Pedido em Operação que não atualiza saldos, não permitido para fazer nota!') Case (PedSts <> Status_Pedido.ABERTO) And (PedSts <> Status_Pedido.SEPARANDO) msg('Somente pedidos com o status estoque "ABERTO" ou "SEPARANDO" pode fazer nota!') Otherwise GravaNotaTemporariaVenda.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, '55') wpSelecionaProdutosNFe.Link(&Pgmname, EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndCase Endif Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Fechar Estoque Pedido Venda. [COMPRAFECHAESTOQUE]') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do CopiarPedido' wpCopiarPedidoCompra.Link(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AdicionaObs' wpReferenciasComerciais.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCliCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do PrecoVenda' loadWWPContext.Call(&Context) RetornaConfSistema.Call(&Context.EmPCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon083_Markup, &TCon083_Markup) &PadRotLin = 'ATPRC' + trim(Str(&Context.EmpCod)) + trim(Str(&Context.FilCod)) + trim(Str(&Context.PesCod)) padraoUsuario.Call('G', &PadRotLin, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, '', &PadDtaMod) if &TCon083_Markup = 'S' WWPlanilhaCustoPedido.Link(PedCod) Else WWPlanilhaCustoAcres.Link(PedCod) EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Criticaspedido' // wpCriticasPedido.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Criticaspedido_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do CancelarPedido' &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('WWPEDIDOCOMPRA', Status_SimNao.Nao, 3) If &AutNiv >= 3 if PedSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ CancelarPedido_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else msg('Somente Pedidos de Compra com Status Estoque ABERTO, podem ser cancelados!') EndIf Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível 3. Cancelar Pedido Compra. [WWPEDIDOCOMPRA]') EndIF EndSub Sub 'Do geraEtiquetaProduto' &EtqCod = trim(str(&EmpCod)) + trim(str(&FilCod)) + trim(Str(&PesCod)) PadraoUsuario.Call('G','#EtiquetaCompra#',&PesCod,&EmpCod,&EtqCod,&DATAVAZIA) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ geraEtiquetaProduto_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Totalizar' RetornaTotalPedidosVendaGrid.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, &PedSts, &PedStsFin, &PedCliCod, &PedStsCrd, &PedDtaEms, &PedDtaEms_To, &PedDtaFat1, &PedDtaFat_To1, &LctCod1, &PedVenCod1,'C', &FinMedioMoeda,&medioMoeda,&PedidoMoeda,&QtdPedidos,&FinQtdPedido,&FinPedidoMoeda) //wpTotalizaPedidos.Popup(&FinMedioMoeda,&medioMoeda,&PedidoMoeda,&QtdPedidos,&FinQtdPedido,&FinPedidoMoeda) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Totalizar_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do espaco2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do SalvaFiltros' saveColumnsSelectorState.Call('FLT#WWPedidoCompraColumnsSelector', '1') wwPedidoCompra.Link() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do NaoSalvar' saveColumnsSelectorState.Call('FLT#WWPedidoCompraColumnsSelector', '2') wwPedidoCompra.Link() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILCOD" &FilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDFATFILCOD" &PedFatFilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDBLQ" &PedBlq.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"LCTTIP" &LctTip.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"LCTATUSAL" &LctAtuSal.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCOD" &PedCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDSTS" &PedSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCLICOD" &PedCliCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCLIRAZ" &PedCliRaz.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDSTSFIN" &PedStsFin.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDNOVSTSFINCOD" &PedNovStsFinCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDDTAEMS" &PedDtaEms.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &PedDtaEms_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &PedDtaFat1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &PedDtaFat_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDNUM' &PedNum1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDVENCOD' &PedVenCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' &FiltroKey = 'FLT#WWPedidoCompraColumnsSelector' &UmZero = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(&FiltroKey) Do CAse Case &UmZero = '2' &SalvarFiltro = false Case &UmZero = '1' &SalvarFiltro = true Otherwise RetornaConfUsuario.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.PesCod, domConfUsuario.Uconf001_PadraoFiltro, &UmZero) if &UmZero = '2' &SalvarFiltro = false Else &SalvarFiltro = true EndiF EndCase if &SalvarFiltro = true /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILCOD", "", not &FilCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &FilCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDFATFILCOD", "", not &PedFatFilCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedFatFilCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDBLQ", "", not &PedBlq.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedBlq, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"LCTTIP", "", not &LctTip.IsEmpty(), 0, &LctTip, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"LCTATUSAL", "", not &LctAtuSal.IsEmpty(), 0, &LctAtuSal, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDCOD", "", not &PedCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDSTS", "", not &PedSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDCLICOD", "", not &PedCliCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedCliCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDCLIRAZ", "", not &PedCliRaz.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedCliRaz, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDSTSFIN", "", not &PedStsFin.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedStsFin, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDNOVSTSFINCOD", "", not &PedNovStsFinCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedNovStsFinCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDDTAEMS", "", not (&PedDtaEms.IsEmpty() AND &PedDtaEms_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &PedDtaEms.ToString().Trim(), &PedDtaEms_To.ToString().Trim()) Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Endif EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedDtaFat1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PedDtaFat_To1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDNUM' AND not &PedNum1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedNum1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDVENCOD' AND not &PedVenCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedVenCod1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedDtaFat2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PedDtaFat_To2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDNUM' AND not &PedNum2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedNum2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDVENCOD' AND not &PedVenCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedVenCod2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedDtaFat3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PedDtaFat_To3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDNUM' AND not &PedNum3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedNum3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDVENCOD' AND not &PedVenCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedVenCod3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Pedido" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'DoExport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate Excel spreadsheet and download it. Do 'LoadGridState' ExportwwPedidoCompra.Call(&ExcelFilename, &ErrorMessage) If (&ExcelFilename <> "") Link(&ExcelFilename) Else msg(&ErrorMessage) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'DoExportReport' if 1 = 2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate PDF file. Do 'LoadGridState' InNewWindow1.Target = ExportReportwwPedidoCompra.Link() InNewWindow1.Height = !'600' InNewWindow1.Width = !'800' InNewWindow1.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ else // Generate PDF file. Do 'LoadGridState' InNewWindow1.Target = RelatorioPedidoCompra_Total_PDF.Link() InNewWindow1.Height = !'600' InNewWindow1.Width = !'800' InNewWindow1.OpenWindow() EndIf EndSub Event &PedStsFin.IsValid Do 'GetComboSts' EndEvent Event &IsMarcado.Click &IsAchou = false If &IsMarcado = true //TRUE For &SdtPedidosItem in &SdtPedidos if &sdtPedidosItem.PedCod = PedCod &IsAchou = true Exit EndIF EndFor if &IsAchou = false &SdtPedidosItem = New() &sdtPedidosItem.EmPCod = EmpCod &sdtPedidosItem.FiLCod = FilCod &sdtPedidosItem.PedCod = PedCod &SdtPedidosItem.PedCliCodRaz = &gridPedCliCodRaz &SdtPedidosItem.pedDtaEms = PedDtaEms &SdtPedidosItem.pedVlrLiq = PedVlrLiq &SdtPedidos.Add(&sdtPedidosItem) EndIF Else //FALSE For &SdtPedidosItem in &SdtPedidos if &sdtPedidosItem.PedCod = PedCod &Index = &sdtPedidos.IndexOf(&sdtPedidosItem) &sdtPedidos.Remove(&Index) Exit EndIF EndFor EndIf do 'txtMarcados' EndEvent Event PedidosSelecionados.Click wpPedidoSelecionado.Popup(&PedidosSelecionados) Refresh EndEvent Event geraEtiquetaProduto_Modal.Close if geraetiquetaProduto_Modal.Result = 'S' wpGeraEtiquetaProduto.Link() Endif EndEvent Event 'DoAjuda' innewWindow.Target = 'https://ajuda.jaspi.com.br/index.aspx?07b9c0fb-8563-4763-bb27-98ff3341caa0' inNewWindow.Name = '_blank' innewWindow.OpenWindow() EndEvent Event 'F4' 4 PromptFornecedores.Popup(&EmpCod, &PedCliCod) &PedCliCod.SetFocus() EndEvent Event &EnviarEmail.Click wpEnviaPedido.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndEvent Event &ImprimirPedido.Click wpImprimirPedidoCompra.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndEvent Event &PedCliCod.IsValid If &OldPedCliCod <> &PedCliCod Refresh EndIF EndEvent Event limpar_campo.Click &SdtPedidos.Clear() do 'txtMarcados' Refresh EndEvent Sub 'diasMaximo' if &QtdDiasMaximo > 0 if &PedDtaEms_To.IsEmpty() &PedDtaEms_To = serverdate() Endif if &PedDtaEms.IsEmpty() &PedDtaEms_To = serverdate() &PedDtaEms = &PedDtaEms_To - &QtdDiasMaximo Else if (&PedDtaEms_To - &PedDtaEms) > &QtdDiasMaximo &PedDtaEms = &PedDtaEms_To - &QtdDiasMaximo Endif Endif else txtPeriodoMaximo.Visible = 0 Endif EndSub Sub 'GetComboSts' &SdtStatusPedido.Clear() &SdtStatusPedido = DpStatusPedido.udp(&EmpCod, &PedSts, 'C') &PedNovStsFinCod.Clear() &PedNovStsFinCod.AddItem(0,'TODOS STATUS') For &SdtStatusPedidoItm in &SdtStatusPedido &PedNovStsFinCod.AddItem(&SdtStatusPedidoItm.StsCod,&SdtStatusPedidoItm.StsNom) EndFor EndSub Sub 'IsSelecionado' For &SdtPedidosItem in &SdtPedidos If &sdtPedidosItem.PedCod = &AuxPedCod &IsMarcado = true EndIf EndFor EndSub Sub 'txtMarcados' &numeric = &SdtPedidos.Count PedidosSelecionados.Caption = trim(str(&numeric)) + ' - PEDIDOS' padraoUsuario.Call('G', &PedidosSelecionados, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &SdtPedidos.ToJson(), &PadDtaMod) EndSub Sub 'loadSelecionados' padraoUsuario.Call('L', &PedidosSelecionados, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) &SdtPedidos.FromJson(&PadObs) do 'txtMarcados' EndSub Sub 'montaFilialFaturamento' &PedFatFilCod.Clear() &PedFatFilCod.AddItem(0, '0 - TODAS FILIAIS') tbFilialFaturamento.Visible = 0 For &Filials in &Context.Filials &PedFatFilCod.AddItem(&Filials.FilCodVin, gxGetMLi(&Filials.FilRazVin, 1, 25)) EndFor if &Context.Filials.Count > 1 tbFilialFaturamento.Visible = 1 Endif EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Exigir autorização para fechar pedido compra (Financeiro e Estoque)
